title: Decoherence: When Quantum Meets Classical
description: Understand how quantum systems lose their quantum properties through interaction with the environment - the major challenge in building practical quantum computers.
learningObjectives: Define decoherence and distinguish it from measurement
Understand how environment interactions destroy superposition
Calculate decoherence times and their significance
Explore the role of decoherence in the quantum-classical transition
Understand T1 and T2 times in quantum computing contexts
